TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Satefo, title = Satefo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Satefo} }

S.FORM: alang Satefo ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 63 buwan, 148 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 136 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 12 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis81%, Bunun1%, Sakizaya 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 8%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Satefo hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Satefo hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Satefo hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Satefo hya' ga llyung. qalang Satefo ga maki 1 kyokay. tay mkyahu' na Satefo hya' ga Lingacay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Satefo ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Satefo ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 63 buwan, 148 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 136 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 12 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis81%, Bunun1%, Sakizaya 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 8%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Satefo hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Satefo hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Satefo hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Satefo hya' ga llyung. qalang Satefo ga maki 1 kyokay. tay mkyahu' na Satefo hya' ga Lingacay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Satefo ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕate*o ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βuri ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ**%, βunun*%, s~ɕakizaja *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕate*o ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na s~ɕate*o ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕate*o ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕate*o ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. qalaŋ s~ɕate*o ɣa maki * kjokaj. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕate*o ħjaʔ ɣa liŋaʦ~ʨaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ s~ɕate*o ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
